name: Instant Magnificent Cinnamon Roll Ring
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen dinner rolls (Bridgeford or Rich)
recipeInstructions:
1. On a baking sheet, lightly roast pecans for approximately 8 minutes in a preheated 350°F oven.
2. While warm, stir in 1 tablespoon butter and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
3. Spray a bundt pan very liberally with non-stick spray.
4. Sprinkle about 1/4 cup pecans in the bundt pan.
5. In a small bowl, stir together cinnamon, sugar, and brown sugar. Roll each frozen roll in cinnamon-sugar mixture and place in the bundt pan.
6. After placing about half of the rolls in the pan, sprinkle with 3/4 of the remaining pecans.
7. Top with the last half of rolls. Sprinkle remaining pecans and butterscotch pudding mix over the rolls.
8. Cut butter into 1/2-inch cubes and dot around the bundt pan.
9. Cover loosely with waxed paper or plastic and leave on a cool spot on the counter to rise overnight (it will rise out of the pan).
10. Preheat oven to 350°F and bake for 30 minutes. Allow to cool about 5 minutes in the pan, then unmold onto a serving platter.
